WELCOME

My Favorites
🐱 Cats
If I had to choose one animal that always makes me smile, it would be cats. If I had to choose one animal that always makes me smile, it would be cats. There's something special about the way they quietly become part of your day. They don't always ask for attention, but when they decide to curl up beside you or gently purr, it feels like their own little way of saying, "I trust you." I love watching them chase toys, stretch lazily under the sunlight or suddenly zoom around the house for no reason at all. Their soft fur, funny personalities and calm presence can brighten even my worst days. see more...
🎵 Music
Music has always been more than just sound to me, it's something I can always turn to, no matter how I feel. Music has always been more than just sound to me — it's something I can always turn to, no matter how I feel. On happy days, upbeat songs make me want to dance and enjoy the moment. On quiet days, slow melodies help me think, breathe and understand my emotions. Sometimes, a single song can say the words I can't explain myself. That's why music feels like a friend who always knows exactly what I need to hear. see more...
🌅 Sunsets
No matter how busy life gets, sunsets always remind me to slow down. No matter how busy life gets, sunsets always remind me to slow down. Watching the sky slowly change from blue to shades of orange, pink and purple feels like nature's way of painting a masterpiece before the day ends. In those few peaceful moments, my worries seem smaller and I remember to be thankful for another day. A sunset may only last for a short while, but the feeling it leaves behind stays much longer. see more...
🍽️ Food
Some of my happiest memories are connected to food. Some of my happiest memories are connected to food. Chocolate is my favorite sweet because it melts so smoothly and somehow makes every day feel a little brighter. I also love spaghetti, especially when it's cooked with a sweet-style sauce that reminds me of family gatherings and celebrations. Marshmallows are another favorite — they're soft, fluffy and even better when roasted or paired with chocolate. These simple foods aren't just delicious, they remind me of laughter, shared meals and moments spent with the people I love. see more...
👫 My Friends
Life wouldn't be the same without my friends. Life wouldn't be the same without my friends. They're the people who make ordinary days unforgettable with their jokes, stories and endless laughter. They celebrate my successes, encourage me when I feel discouraged and remind me that I never have to face challenges alone. Having friends who accept me for who I am is one of the greatest blessings I could ever ask for. see more...
🎬 Movies
Movies are one of my favorite ways to relax and escape into different worlds. Movies are one of my favorite ways to relax and escape into different worlds. I enjoy stories that make me laugh, inspire me or even bring tears to my eyes. I especially love Minions and Doraemon because they're funny, heartwarming and filled with lessons about friendship, kindness and believing in yourself. I also enjoy watching BL (Boys Love) series because they portray different kinds of love while encouraging acceptance, equality and respect for the LGBTQIA+ community. These stories remind me that everyone deserves kindness, understanding and the freedom to be themselves. see more...
📱 Social Media
For me, social media is more than just scrolling through posts it's a place where I can connect, learn and express myself. For me, social media is more than just scrolling through posts — it's a place where I can connect, learn and express myself. It helps me stay in touch with friends and family, discover creative ideas and keep up with what's happening around the world. I enjoy exploring art, music, technology and different cultures through the people I follow. While it's important to use it responsibly, social media has become a meaningful part of my daily life because it brings people, ideas and opportunities together in one place. see more...
💻 Coding
Coding is one of the things that challenges me in the best way. Coding is one of the things that challenges me in the best way. At first, it can be confusing, but there's a special kind of happiness that comes from finally solving a problem after spending time figuring it out. Every line of code feels like a small piece of a puzzle and watching everything work together is incredibly satisfying. I enjoy learning new programming skills because they allow me to turn ideas into something real, whether it's a simple program, a website or a project I'm proud of. Coding reminds me that mistakes aren't failures — they're just part of learning and improving. Every bug I fix teaches me something new and motivates me to keep going. see more...

WHAT'S NEW

UPDATE 1.9 [OPTIMIZED] 7/16/26, 8:00AM

In this update, I optimized parts of my website and made a few small improvements. see more...

⏳ Loading Screen

Added 40 new loading messages.

Reworked the welcome message and added a 3D effect to the Skip button.

🏡 Main Menu

Added a Rate Us!

Fixed an issue where all buttons couldn't be clicked.

Fixed the Updates In timer, which would randomly stop.

⚙️ Settings

Added a "Please leave a star rating".

Fixed review submission.

Fixed an issue where Day/Night Mode would randomly switch to a red background every 5 minutes.

Removed the console from appearing in Settings.

💙 Others

Added 2 Coming Soon sections.

Added a timer to 1 Coming Soon.

Fixed the modals in My Apps.

Added a timer on Music on Others i will be reworking this Music Modal

Fixed the links in Singers, which were opening random websites.

🐞 Bugs & Improvements

Fixed 10 bugs.

Implemented 8 improvements.

Fixed a major bug affecting the website.

Feel free to submit your suggestions using the feedback form or by leaving a star rating and review.

Thank you to the 5 people who reported issues with my website!

That's all for this update. See you in the next one! see less...

UPDATE 1.8 7/2/26, 12:00PM

In this update, I fixed several bugs and made improvements to my website. see more...

🏠 Main Menu

Adjusted the "Updates In" timer.

Fixed the positioning of buttons in landscape mode.

Fixed the screen flashing issue that occurred when rotating your mobile device and when the keyboard was open. This issue has now been resolved.

Added Time and Date to Main Menu.

Fixed the positioning of Updates In box and Answer this form.

💬 Message Me

Added a Theme button.

Added a Log Out button.

Added a Log in interface.

Added a Create an Account option.

Added profanity filter, sending messages or names containing prohibited words will result in a permanent violation up to 10 points reaching 0 points may result in a permanently ban.

Added message timestamps that automatically convert to your local time zone.

Improved password storage.

Fixed the eye icon.

Fixed the date and time displayed in chat bubbles.

Fixed the Remaining Time in Edit your message.

💙 Others

Fixed the timers in NovaAI, Box Dash, Calendar, Clock and Maps. They now use your local time zone. Manually changing your device's time in Settings will no longer affect them.

Added UTC below the clock.

Added AM/PM to the clock.

🐛 Bugs & Improvements

Fixed 45+ bugs.

Implemented 15+ improvements.

Feel free to submit suggestions using the form or send me a message through "Message Me."

That's all for today's update. Thank you! see less...

UPDATE 1.1 9/30/25, 12:00PM

These fixes are now applied in this version see more...

Fixed the blue button, because it's too big

UPDATE 1.0 7/25/25, 10:00AM

UI REFORGE + MUSIC SYSTEM UPGRADE see more...

⏳ Loading Screen

📊 Moved percentage text below "Loading…"

🔄 Added rotating smart messages (show once per session)

🎵 Music Player Update

Unified play/pause logic for smoother switching

Added -5s / +5s skip buttons

Loop & Repeat now use class-based toggle animations

Draggable, touch-friendly progress bar

Active song highlight improved

📱 Modal Upgrade (Mobile & Desktop)

Mobile landscape = fullscreen, no border-radius

Desktop modal width refined

Blur/shadow improved

Close buttons repositioned

Smoother internal scrolling

⚠️ "!" Button Enhancement

Turns red + performs a one-time rotation

Animation fully resets when modal closes

Faster activation response

🖼️ Layout & Styling

Improved spacing for all button groups

Unified padding across modals

Better responsive fonts

Cleaner progress bar visuals

Consistent hover/active states

🔧 JavaScript Improvements

Centralized modal logic

Optimized music control functions

Touch scrubbing support

Cleaner event listeners

Removed redundant state resets

🐛 Fixes, Changes & QOL

Fixed modal overflow on small screens

Fixed audio desync on song change

Removed unused CSS

Improved volume consistency

Minor UI glitch fixes

Overall performance improvements see less...

🚫 BUGS AND ERRORS

My sincerely apologies for the errors and bugs. I'm currently working on fixing them.
